TextView.android:text: Please see a doctor for confirmation

LinearLayout.LinearLayout: <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="#028090" android:textSize="11sp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.5" android:text="Pneumonia: Signs of possible lung infection found (72% probability)" />

<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="#028090" android:textSize="11sp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.5" android:text="Infiltration: Some cloudiness in lung area (44% probability)" />

TextView.android:text: Heart size and bone structure look normal

LinearLayout.LinearLayout: <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="#7A4A00" android:textSize="11sp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.55" android:text="This is an AI screening only, not a diagnosis. See a doctor to confirm." />

TextView.android:text: Your chest X-ray shows signs that could be a lung infection (pneumonia). Your lungs have some cloudiness that wasn't expected. Please see a doctor as soon as possible for proper confirmation and treatment.
Visit a doctor soon — within 1–2 days
Rest and avoid contact with others
Stay hydrated and monitor your temperature

LinearLayout.LinearLayout: <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="<5% each" android:textColor="#2A9D5C" android:textSize="10sp" android:textStyle="bold" />

LinearLayout.com.google.android.material.card.Materia: <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="10dp" android:textColor="#05668D" android:textSize="11sp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.6" android:text="AI Clinical Note (DenseNet121): Right lower lobe opacity pattern consistent with community-acquired pneumonia. Recommend PA + lateral for better characterization. CBC with differential and CRP/procalcitonin may help confirm infectious etiology." />

TextView.android:text: PA + lateral view for improved localization
Empirical antibiotic therapy per local protocol
